event.title: Dishari Picnic 2026
event.description:
Dishari Picnic 2026 is a relaxed summer gathering where our Bengali community comes together over food, adda, and games in the Boston area 🧺🌳. Please use this form to register your group so we can plan meals and activities thoughtfully.

By signing up, you help Dishari continue its mission of celebrating Bengali cultureand creating a welcoming space for friends, families, and new community members. We look forward to sharing the day with you.
